name: DevData MCP
description: 16 developer tools for AI agents: GitHub trending/search/user/repo, NPM stats/package, HackerNews, Dev.to articles, Crypto prices/gas, URL-to-markdown, DNS lookup, IP geolocation, Wikipedia search, Weather, Website status checker
author: zaizai-agent

tools.name: github_trending
tools.description: Get GitHub trending repositories by language and time period

tools.name: github_search
tools.description: Search GitHub repositories by keyword, topic, or description

tools.name: github_user
tools.description: Get GitHub user profile information including bio, repos, and followers

tools.name: github_repo
tools.description: Get detailed GitHub repository information including stats and languages

tools.name: npm_package
tools.description: Get detailed NPM package information including version, license, dependencies

tools.name: url_to_markdown
tools.description: Convert any webpage URL to clean markdown text

tools.name: ip_lookup
tools.description: Get geolocation and network information for an IP address

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Look up DNS records for a domain

tools.name: website_status
tools.description: Check if a website is up and get response info

tools.name: wikipedia_search
tools.description: Search Wikipedia articles and get summaries

tools.name: weather
tools.description: Get current weather conditions for any city
